name_en: In stock 26C Series Pearl Chain Clutch. Classic quilted, small lambskin. 🌟🌟🌟 Vintage metal chain with pearl accents, elegant and modern. Hobo shape, moderate capacity, fits phone 📱 and lipstick. Great for commuting or going out. Adjustable strap, switch between shoulder and crossbody. Pearl chain is very dynamic, adds a vibe. Black and gold colorway, understated luxury, practical and stylish. size:13-23.5-7.99537
